interfaces.name: getCategories
interfaces.description: Get the list of top-level ebook categories for navigation and homepage links.

interfaces.name: getHomepageFeaturedProducts
interfaces.description: Get featured and recommended ebooks for the homepage hero and featured sections.

interfaces.name: getActivePromotions
interfaces.description: Get currently active promotions and promo codes (e.g., READ10) to display on homepage and cart banners.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the current cart for header icon display (item count and totals). Cart is managed internally.

interfaces.name: getWishlistSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the wishlist for header icon display (item count). Wishlist is managed internally.

interfaces.name: getBrowseFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for browse/search results pages, including languages, availability, and rating presets.

minRating.description: Minimum rating value represented by this preset

interfaces.name: getBrowseSortOptions
interfaces.description: Get available sort options for browse/search results pages.

label.description: User-facing label, e.g., 'Price: Low to High'

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search and browse ebooks by query and/or category, with filters and sorting for results pages.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search, e.g., 'time management', 'python programming', or author names.

parameters.name: categoryCode
parameters.description: Optional category filter, e.g., 'science_fiction', 'fantasy', 'romance', 'business_economics', 'self_help', 'all_ebooks'.

releaseDateFrom.description: Inclusive start of release date range in ISO format, e.g., '2025-01-01'. Used for upcoming/preorder tasks.

releaseDateTo.description: Inclusive end of release date range in ISO format.

onlyPreorderAvailable.description: If true, limit to products where availability_status is 'upcoming' and is_preorder_available is true.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort option id, e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'publication_date_desc', 'rating_desc', 'release_date_asc'.

interfaces.name: searchAuthors
interfaces.description: Search authors by name to populate the Authors tab from search results (e.g., for 'Neil Gaiman').

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Author name or partial name to search.

interfaces.name: getAuthorDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific author to display on the author detail page.

parameters.name: authorId
parameters.description: Identifier of the author whose page is being viewed.

interfaces.name: getAuthorProducts
interfaces.description: Get ebooks for a specific author with filter and sort options on the author detail page.

parameters.name: authorId
parameters.description: Author identifier from the author page.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort option id, e.g., 'rating_desc', 'publication_date_desc', 'price_asc'.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific ebook to display on the product detail page, including pricing, rating, language, page count, and release information.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product selected from results or recommendations.

interfaces.name: getRecommendedProducts
interfaces.description: Get recommended ebooks for a given product to populate the 'Customers also bought' / 'You may also like' section on the product detail page.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Product identifier from the product detail page.

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the current cart, creating an active cart if one does not exist. Handles both normal purchases and preorders based on product availability.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product to add.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Quantity to add (ebooks typically use 1).

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item and recalculate cart totals.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the cart item to update.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity for the cart item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and recalculate totals.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the cart item to remove.

interfaces.name: clearCart
interfaces.description: Remove all items and promo codes from the current cart, leaving an empty active cart state.

interfaces.name: getCartDetails
interfaces.description: Get full cart details for the cart page, including line items, associated products, applied promo codes, and totals.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCode
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code (e.g., READ10) to the current cart, updating discounts and totals.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Promo code text entered by the user, e.g., 'READ10'.

message.description: User-friendly message explaining result or any errors.

interfaces.name: removePromoCode
interfaces.description: Remove a previously applied promo code from the current cart and recalculate totals.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Promo code text to remove.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a concise order summary from the current cart for the checkout page, including items, promotions, and totals.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Create an order from the current cart, collecting purchaser and payment details, and return an order confirmation used on the checkout confirmation page.

parameters.name: purchaserName
parameters.description: Name of the purchaser for receipts.

parameters.name: purchaserEmail
parameters.description: Email address used for receipts and ebook delivery.

parameters.name: paymentMethod
parameters.description: Payment method, e.g., 'card', 'paypal', 'other'.

parameters.name: paymentDetails
parameters.description: Opaque payment details object; specific fields used depend on paymentMethod.

cardNumber.description: Card number for 'card' method (masked or tokenized in real implementations).

paypalOrderId.description: External order or token identifier for 'paypal' method.

parameters.name: agreeToTerms
parameters.description: Indicates the purchaser has agreed to terms and conditions.

message.description: Confirmation or error message to display.

interfaces.name: getWishlistDetails
interfaces.description: Get the current wishlist contents for the wishlist page, including wishlist items and associated products.

interfaces.name: addToWishlist
interfaces.description: Add a product to the current wishlist, creating a default wishlist if none exists.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product to add to the wishlist.

interfaces.name: removeFromWishlist
interfaces.description: Remove a product from the wishlist.

parameters.name: wishlistItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the wishlist item to remove.

interfaces.name: moveWishlistItemToCart
interfaces.description: Add a wishlist item to the cart (leaving it in the wishlist or optionally removing it based on UI behavior).

parameters.name: wishlistItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the wishlist item to add to cart.

parameters.name: removeFromWishlist
parameters.description: If true, also remove the item from the wishlist after adding to cart.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including store purpose, vision, and coverage of genres, languages, and formats.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get Help & FAQ entries explaining searching, filtering, purchasing, preordering, downloads, cart, promo codes, and wishlist.

interfaces.name: getSupportInfo
interfaces.description: Get support contact information for the Contact page, including email, address (if applicable), and support hours.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact/support request from the Contact page form.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the person submitting the request.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email for follow-up.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Short subject line summarizing the request.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Detailed message describing the issue or question.

ticketId.description: Reference id for the support request, if generated.

interfaces.name: getLegalPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for legal and policy pages: Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, and Refunds & Digital Goods Policy.

parameters.name: pageType
parameters.description: Type of legal page to fetch: 'privacy_policy', 'terms_conditions', 'refunds_policy'.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the active cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, discountTotal, and total whenever items or promotions change.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWishlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the default wishlist for the single-user agent.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code against PromoCode rules (active, date range, minimum order total, usage limits).

helperFunctions.name: _createOrderFromCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create an Order and OrderItems from the current Cart during placeOrder.

helperFunctions.name: _persistState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist cart, wishlist, and related state between calls (e.g., using local storage or an in-memory store).
